title: Admissions

openDays.desc: Come and visit our campuses and meet the team.

items.q: From what age do you accept children?
items.a: At the nursery from 6 months, at kindergarten from 3 years old.
Ingeri International School follows the French national curriculum. French is the main language, with an opening to English and Kinyarwanda.
Yes, balanced, varied and locally sourced meals are prepared every day. Children take part in table routines.

items.q: How does the settling-in period work?
items.a: Progressive settling-in: prior visits with parents, short stays that gradually lengthen, respecting the child's own pace.
Yes, we consider each situation individually. Contact us confidentially.
